title: Dispatcher Board — Weekly View with Date Navigation
description: Replace the current pool/column layout with a 7-column weekly view (Mon–Sun). Each column shows jobs scheduled for that day, sorted by time. Dispatcher can navigate weeks with prev/next arrows and jump to any week via date picker.
acceptanceCriteria: Board shows 7 columns, one per day Mon–Sun, with the current week as default
Each column header shows the weekday name and date in Finnish format (e.g. 'Ma 28.4.')
Jobs appear in the column matching their scheduledStart date, sorted by time ascending
Jobs without scheduledStart appear in an 'Unscheduled' pool above the weekly grid
Prev/next week arrow buttons shift the view by 7 days
Date picker input lets dispatcher jump to any week — week adjusts to contain the selected date
implementationNotes: Week starts on Monday — use date-fns startOfWeek with weekStartsOn: 1
Finnish weekday abbreviations: Ma, Ti, Ke, To, Pe, La, Su
Date formatting follows existing Finnish pattern already in the codebase (dd.MM.yyyy)
Jobs are fetched for the visible week range: GET /api/jobs?scheduledFrom=<ISO>&scheduledTo=<ISO> — if this query param is not supported in backend add it
Keep existing Job and Driver types — do not redefine them
Unscheduled pool uses the same JobCard component as columns
